channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LUDOC-535] Lustre Wiki: Review changelog, release, and event page organization
item.description:
The following pages are all over 3 years old.  These are being reviewed as part of the efforts of the Lustre Documentation Working Group.  The main intent of this bug is to evaluate if these pages require:

  • Reorganization
  • Removal due to staleness
  • Extension due to missing material
  • Correction to fix incorrect or stale material

The author is expected to annotate this work item with the changes expected.  They may or may not make those changes as part of this work item.  If they choose to not make those changes, they are expected to create a new work item where the identified, explicit improvements can be made by another individual within the LUDOC stream.  If they do choose to make those changes, please clarify such in the comment section.

The full list of pages include:

Changelog Pages:

[Change Log 1.6|https://wiki.lustre.org/Change_Log_1.6]‏‎ (09:58, 3 March 2016)

[Change Log 1.8|https://wiki.lustre.org/Change_Log_1.8]‏‎ (10:02, 3 March 2016)

[Change Log 2.0|https://wiki.lustre.org/Change_Log_2.0]‏‎ (09:35, 4 March 2016)

[Lustre 2.8.0 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.8.0_Changelog]‏‎ (23:14, 19 July 2017)

[Lustre 2.9.0 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.9.0_Changelog]‏‎ (23:14, 19 July 2017)

[Lustre 2.10.1 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.10.1_Changelog]‏‎ (20:53, 2 October 2017)

[Lustre 2.10.2 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.10.2_Changelog]‏‎ (08:20, 25 April 2018)

[Lustre 2.11.0 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.11.0_Changelog]‏‎ (11:02, 22 June 2018)

[Lustre 2.10.0 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.10.0_Changelog]‏‎ (11:09, 22 June 2018)

[Lustre 2.10.8 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.10.8_Changelog]‏‎ (14:40, 16 May 2019)

[Lustre 2.12.2 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.12.2_Changelog]‏‎ (14:51, 25 May 2019)

[Lustre 2.12.3 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.12.3_Changelog]‏‎ (16:01, 18 November 2019)

[Lustre 2.10.7 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.10.7_Changelog]‏‎ (16:11, 18 November 2019)

[Lustre 2.13.0 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.13.0_Changelog]‏‎ (11:24, 5 December 2019)

[Lustre 2.12.4 Changelog|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_2.12.4_Changelog]‏‎ (16:28, 10 February 2020)

Releases:

[European Lustre Workshop 2011|https://wiki.lustre.org/European_Lustre_Workshop_2011]‏‎ (15:47, 3 July 2020)
item.summary: Lustre Wiki: Review changelog, release, and event page organization

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Summary of changes:

Nesting pages is not well-supported in mediawiki.  I always forget this.  This unfortunately means doing something like "releases/2.12.0/{changelog,release_notes}" is not plausible, as nice as that would be.

 

Changelog Pages: While we're not normally supposed to lead with "Lustre" in the name since this is the Lustre Wiki, I think for the changelogs I prefer this parlance.  I normalized all pages to the format:
Lustre_<M.N[.O]>_Changelog

The early changelog pages contain multiple patch release versions per page, but I prefer the more recent single change per page format.

All pages were added to the Releases category.  If they were in the Changelog category before (only a handful) that category tag was eliminated.

Release Pages: These were already titled Release_<M.N[.O]>, which I think is great, so I left these alone.  Any pages missing the Releases category tag were updated with it.

LUG Pages: These were already named well.  Just added a LUG category tag since this is a sizable pile of pages.

LAD Pages: 
Added LAD to the one page that's on here.  It would be great to get the rest categorized appropriately.

Lustre.org Minutes Pages:
Ensured pre-existing Lustre.org category was used across these pages.  A few were missing them.

EOFS, Lustre Fall Workshop, All Hands, and HPC Workshop: were all left alone as they had an Events tag and were named acceptable.  Again, it would be stellar to organize these into an misc events directory, but I guess we just tolerate this kind of legacy content for now in the mix with the rest.

Pages Slated for Deletion (need to get perms):
Multi-Rail LNet/LAD15 Lustre Interface Bonding‏‎ (12:26, 4 March 2016) - this is a summary page of content from a 2015 talk.  It is mostly slides, and is an awkward repeat of content that is already present if you download the slide from the LAD15 page.
